This thesis proposes a novel approach that uses Q-Learning on top of LGP, Reinforced Linear Genetic Programming (RLGP) to learn the optimal register-action assignments. In doing so, we introduce a new framework "linear-gp" written in memory-safe Rust that allows for extensive experimentation for future works.
tldr: This paper introduces Reinforced Linear Genetic Programming (RLGP), a novel approach combining Q-Learning and Linear Genetic Programming to learn optimal register-action assignments, along with a new Rust-based experimentation framework.
tldr_zh: 该论文介绍了增强线性遗传编程 (RLGP)，这是一种结合了 Q-Learning 和线性遗传编程的新方法，用于学习最佳寄存器-动作分配，并提供了一个新的基于 Rust 的实验框架。
summary_zh: 线性遗传编程 (LGP) 是一种强大的技术，它允许使用程序的线性表示来解决各种问题。然而，该技术仍然存在一些局限性，例如需要人类显式地将寄存器映射到动作。本论文提出了一种新的方法，即在 LGP 之上使用 Q-学习，称为强化线性遗传编程 (RLGP)，以学习最佳的寄存器-动作分配。为此，我们引入了一个用内存安全的 Rust 编写的新的框架“linear-gp”，它允许为未来的工作进行广泛的实验。

title: Online Decision-Making Under Uncertainty for Vehicle-to-Building Systems
summary: Vehicle-to-building (V2B) systems integrate physical infrastructures, such as smart buildings and electric vehicles (EVs) connected to chargers at the building, with digital control mechanisms to manage energy use. By utilizing EVs as flexible energy reservoirs, buildings can dynamically charge and discharge them to optimize energy use and cut costs under time-variable pricing and demand charge policies. This setup leads to the V2B optimization problem, where buildings coordinate EV charging and discharging to minimize total electricity costs while meeting users' charging requirements. However, the V2B optimization problem is challenging because of: (1) fluctuating electricity pricing, which includes both energy charges ($/kWh) and demand charges ($/kW); (2) long planning horizons (typically over 30 days); (3) heterogeneous chargers with varying charging rates, controllability, and directionality (i.e., unidirectional or bidirectional); and (4) user-specific battery levels at departure to ensure user requirements are met. In contrast to existing approaches that often model this setting as a single-shot combinatorial optimization problem, we highlight critical limitations in prior work and instead model the V2B optimization problem as a Markov decision process (MDP), i.e., a stochastic control process. Solving the resulting MDP is challenging due to the large state and action spaces. To address the challenges of the large state space, we leverage online search, and we counter the action space by using domain-specific heuristics to prune unpromising actions. We validate our approach in collaboration with Nissan Advanced Technology Center - Silicon Valley. Using data from their EV testbed, we show that the proposed framework significantly outperforms state-of-the-art methods.
tldr: This paper addresses the Vehicle-to-Building (V2B) optimization problem using a Markov Decision Process (MDP) and online search with domain-specific heuristics to manage EV charging/discharging for cost minimization, demonstrating significant improvement over state-of-the-art methods using real-world data.
tldr_zh: 本文使用马尔可夫决策过程 (MDP) 和带有领域特定启发式的在线搜索来解决车辆到建筑物 (V2B) 优化问题，以管理电动汽车的充电/放电以实现成本最小化，并使用真实世界的数据证明了相对于最先进方法的显著改进。
summary_zh: 车辆到建筑（V2B）系统将物理基础设施（例如智能建筑和连接至建筑充电器的电动汽车（EV））与数字控制机制相集成，以管理能源使用。通过利用电动汽车作为灵活的能量储存器，建筑物可以动态地对其进行充电和放电，从而在分时电价和需量电费政策下优化能源使用并降低成本。这种设置引出了V2B优化问题，即建筑物协调电动汽车的充电和放电，以在满足用户充电需求的同时最大限度地降低总电费。然而，V2B优化问题具有挑战性，因为：（1）波动的电价，其中包括电能费用（美元/千瓦时）和需量费用（美元/千瓦）；（2）较长的规划周期（通常超过30天）；（3）具有不同充电速率、可控性和方向性（即单向或双向）的异构充电器；以及（4）用户在离开时的特定电池电量，以确保满足用户需求。与通常将此设置建模为单次组合优化问题的现有方法不同，我们强调了先前工作的关键局限性，并将V2B优化问题建模为马尔可夫决策过程（MDP），即随机控制过程。由于庞大的状态空间和动作空间，求解由此产生的MDP具有挑战性。为了应对庞大的状态空间带来的挑战，我们利用在线搜索，并通过使用特定领域的启发式方法来修剪没有希望的动作，从而对抗动作空间。我们与日产先进技术中心-硅谷合作验证了我们的方法。使用来自其电动汽车试验台的数据，我们证明了所提出的框架明显优于最先进的方法。

title: ArtCognition: A Multimodal AI Framework for Affective State Sensing from Visual and Kinematic Drawing Cues
summary: The objective assessment of human affective and psychological states presents a significant challenge, particularly through non-verbal channels. This paper introduces digital drawing as a rich and underexplored modality for affective sensing. We present a novel multimodal framework, named ArtCognition, for the automated analysis of the House-Tree-Person (HTP) test, a widely used psychological instrument. ArtCognition uniquely fuses two distinct data streams: static visual features from the final artwork, captured by computer vision models, and dynamic behavioral kinematic cues derived from the drawing process itself, such as stroke speed, pauses, and smoothness. To bridge the gap between low-level features and high-level psychological interpretation, we employ a Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) architecture. This grounds the analysis in established psychological knowledge, enhancing explainability and reducing the potential for model hallucination. Our results demonstrate that the fusion of visual and behavioral kinematic cues provides a more nuanced assessment than either modality alone. We show significant correlations between the extracted multimodal features and standardized psychological metrics, validating the framework's potential as a scalable tool to support clinicians. This work contributes a new methodology for non-intrusive affective state assessment and opens new avenues for technology-assisted mental healthcare.
tldr: The paper presents ArtCognition, a multimodal AI framework for assessing affective states by analyzing visual and kinematic data from digital drawings, using a Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) architecture for enhanced interpretability.
tldr_zh: 该论文提出了ArtCognition，一个多模态AI框架，通过分析数字绘画的视觉和运动学数据来评估情感状态，并使用检索增强生成（RAG）架构来增强可解释性。
summary_zh: 人类情感和心理状态的客观评估，尤其通过非语言渠道，是一个重大挑战。本文引入数字绘画作为一种用于情感感知的丰富且未被充分探索的方式。我们提出了一种名为ArtCognition的创新多模态框架，用于House-Tree-Person (HTP)测试的自动分析，该测试是一种广泛应用的心理测量工具。 ArtCognition独特地融合了两个不同的数据流：来自最终艺术作品的静态视觉特征，由计算机视觉模型捕获；以及来自绘画过程本身的动态行为运动学线索，例如笔画速度、停顿和平滑度。为了弥合低级特征和高级心理学解释之间的差距，我们采用了一种检索增强生成（RAG）架构。这使分析立足于已建立的心理学知识，提高了可解释性并减少了模型幻觉的可能性。我们的结果表明，视觉和行为运动学线索的融合比单独任何一种方式都能提供更细致的评估。我们展示了提取的多模态特征与标准化心理测量指标之间存在显著相关性，验证了该框架作为支持临床医生的可扩展工具的潜力。这项工作贡献了一种用于非侵入式情感状态评估的新方法，并为技术辅助的心理健康护理开辟了新的途径。

title: Decoder Generates Manufacturable Structures: A Framework for 3D-Printable Object Synthesis
summary: This paper presents a novel decoder-based approach for generating manufacturable 3D structures optimized for additive manufacturing. We introduce a deep learning framework that decodes latent representations into geometrically valid, printable objects while respecting manufacturing constraints such as overhang angles, wall thickness, and structural integrity. The methodology demonstrates that neural decoders can learn complex mapping functions from abstract representations to valid 3D geometries, producing parts with significantly improved manufacturability compared to naive generation approaches. We validate the approach on diverse object categories and demonstrate practical 3D printing of decoder-generated structures.
tldr: This paper introduces a deep learning framework using a decoder to generate 3D-printable objects from latent representations, enforcing manufacturability constraints like overhang angles and structural integrity.
tldr_zh: 本文介绍了一种基于解码器的深度学习框架，用于从潜在表示生成3D可打印对象，并强制执行可制造性约束，如悬垂角度和结构完整性。
summary_zh: 本文提出了一种新颖的基于解码器的增材制造优化可制造3D结构生成方法。我们引入了一个深度学习框架，该框架将潜在表征解码为几何上有效、可打印的对象，同时遵守制造约束，例如悬垂角、壁厚和结构完整性。该方法证明了神经解码器可以学习从抽象表征到有效3D几何体的复杂映射函数，生成具有显著改善的可制造性的零件，优于朴素的生成方法。我们在不同的对象类别上验证了该方法，并展示了由解码器生成的结构进行实际3D打印的案例。

title: WeedRepFormer: Reparameterizable Vision Transformers for Real-Time Waterhemp Segmentation and Gender Classification
summary: We present WeedRepFormer, a lightweight multi-task Vision Transformer designed for simultaneous waterhemp segmentation and gender classification. Existing agricultural models often struggle to balance the fine-grained feature extraction required for biological attribute classification with the efficiency needed for real-time deployment. To address this, WeedRepFormer systematically integrates structural reparameterization across the entire architecture - comprising a Vision Transformer backbone, a Lite R-ASPP decoder, and a novel reparameterizable classification head - to decouple training-time capacity from inference-time latency. We also introduce a comprehensive waterhemp dataset containing 10,264 annotated frames from 23 plants. On this benchmark, WeedRepFormer achieves 92.18% mIoU for segmentation and 81.91% accuracy for gender classification using only 3.59M parameters and 3.80 GFLOPs. At 108.95 FPS, our model outperforms the state-of-the-art iFormer-T by 4.40% in classification accuracy while maintaining competitive segmentation performance and significantly reducing parameter count by 1.9x.
tldr: WeedRepFormer is a lightweight Vision Transformer for real-time waterhemp segmentation and gender classification, achieving high accuracy with low computational cost by integrating structural reparameterization. A new dataset is also introduced.
tldr_zh: WeedRepFormer是一种轻量级视觉Transformer，用于实时水麻分割和性别分类，通过集成结构重参数化实现高精度和低计算成本。同时，还引入了一个新的数据集。
summary_zh: 我们提出了WeedRepFormer，一种轻量级多任务Vision Transformer，专为同时进行抗性苋（waterhemp）分割和性别分类而设计。现有的农业模型通常难以平衡生物属性分类所需的细粒度特征提取与实时部署所需的效率。为解决此问题，WeedRepFormer系统地将结构重参数化集成到整个架构中，包括一个Vision Transformer主干、一个Lite R-ASPP解码器和一个新型可重参数化的分类头，从而将训练时的容量与推理时的延迟解耦。我们还引入了一个全面的抗性苋数据集，包含来自23株植物的10,264个带注释的帧。在这个基准测试中，WeedRepFormer仅使用3.59M参数和3.80 GFLOPs，就实现了92.18%的mIoU分割精度和81.91%的性别分类准确率。在108.95 FPS下，我们的模型在分类准确率上比最先进的iFormer-T高出4.40%，同时保持了具有竞争力的分割性能，并将参数数量显著减少了1.9倍。

title: A Single-Loop Bilevel Deep Learning Method for Optimal Control of Obstacle Problems
summary: Optimal control of obstacle problems arises in a wide range of applications and is computationally challenging due to its nonsmoothness, nonlinearity, and bilevel structure. Classical numerical approaches rely on mesh-based discretization and typically require solving a sequence of costly subproblems. In this work, we propose a single-loop bilevel deep learning method, which is mesh-free, scalable to high-dimensional and complex domains, and avoids repeated solution of discretized subproblems. The method employs constraint-embedding neural networks to approximate the state and control and preserves the bilevel structure. To train the neural networks efficiently, we propose a Single-Loop Stochastic First-Order Bilevel Algorithm (S2-FOBA), which eliminates nested optimization and does not rely on restrictive lower-level uniqueness assumptions. We analyze the convergence behavior of S2-FOBA under mild assumptions. Numerical experiments on benchmark examples, including distributed and obstacle control problems with regular and irregular obstacles on complex domains, demonstrate that the proposed method achieves satisfactory accuracy while reducing computational cost compared to classical numerical methods.
tldr: This paper proposes a mesh-free, single-loop bilevel deep learning method (S2-FOBA) for solving optimal control of obstacle problems, demonstrating improved computational efficiency and accuracy on benchmark examples compared to traditional methods.
tldr_zh: 本文提出了一种无网格的单循环双层深度学习方法 (S2-FOBA)，用于解决障碍问题的最优控制，并在基准示例中展示了优于传统方法的计算效率和准确性。
summary_zh: 障碍问题的最优控制广泛应用于诸多领域，并因其非光滑性、非线性和双层结构而面临计算上的挑战。传统的数值方法依赖于基于网格的离散化，通常需要求解一系列计算代价高昂的子问题。本文提出了一种单循环双层深度学习方法，该方法无需网格、可扩展至高维和复杂域，并避免了重复求解离散子问题。该方法采用约束嵌入神经网络来近似状态和控制，并保留了双层结构。为了高效地训练神经网络，我们提出了一种单循环随机一阶双层算法（S2-FOBA），该算法消除了嵌套优化，且不依赖于限制性的下层唯一性假设。我们分析了S2-FOBA在温和假设下的收敛性。在基准算例上的数值实验，包括在复杂域上具有规则和不规则障碍的分布控制和障碍控制问题，表明与传统的数值方法相比，所提出的方法在降低计算成本的同时实现了令人满意的精度。

title: Minimum distance classification for nonlinear dynamical systems
summary: We address the problem of classifying trajectory data generated by some nonlinear dynamics, where each class corresponds to a distinct dynamical system. We propose Dynafit, a kernel-based method for learning a distance metric between training trajectories and the underlying dynamics. New observations are assigned to the class with the most similar dynamics according to the learned metric. The learning algorithm approximates the Koopman operator which globally linearizes the dynamics in a (potentially infinite) feature space associated with a kernel function. The distance metric is computed in feature space independently of its dimensionality by using the kernel trick common in machine learning. We also show that the kernel function can be tailored to incorporate partial knowledge of the dynamics when available. Dynafit is applicable to various classification tasks involving nonlinear dynamical systems and sensors. We illustrate its effectiveness on three examples: chaos detection with the logistic map, recognition of handwritten dynamics and of visual dynamic textures.
tldr: The paper introduces Dynafit, a kernel-based method for classifying trajectory data from nonlinear dynamical systems by learning a distance metric between training data and underlying dynamics using the Koopman operator. It demonstrates effectiveness on tasks like chaos detection and dynamic texture recognition.
tldr_zh: 该论文介绍了一种名为Dynafit的基于核的方法，用于分类非线性动力系统的轨迹数据。该方法通过使用Koopman算子学习训练数据和底层动力学之间的距离度量来实现分类，并在混沌检测和动态纹理识别等任务中展示了有效性。
summary_zh: 我们研究了对由某些非线性动力学系统生成的轨迹数据进行分类的问题，其中每个类别对应于一个不同的动力学系统。我们提出 Dynafit，一种基于核的方法，用于学习训练轨迹与底层动力学系统之间的距离度量。根据学习到的度量，新的观测数据将被分配给具有最相似动力学特征的类别。该学习算法近似 Koopman 算子，该算子在一个与核函数相关的（潜在无限维）特征空间中全局线性化动力学。距离度量通过使用机器学习中常见的核技巧，在特征空间中计算，且与维度无关。我们还表明，当动力学的部分知识可用时，可以定制核函数以包含这些信息。Dynafit 适用于涉及非线性动力学系统和传感器的各种分类任务。我们通过三个示例说明了其有效性：使用 Logistic 映射的混沌检测、手写动力学的识别以及视觉动态纹理的识别。

title: LinkD: AutoRegressive Diffusion Model for Mechanical Linkage Synthesis
summary: Designing mechanical linkages to achieve target end-effector trajectories presents a fundamental challenge due to the intricate coupling between continuous node placements, discrete topological configurations, and nonlinear kinematic constraints. The highly nonlinear motion-to-configuration relationship means small perturbations in joint positions drastically alter trajectories, while the combinatorially expanding design space renders conventional optimization and heuristic methods computationally intractable. We introduce an autoregressive diffusion framework that exploits the dyadic nature of linkage assembly by representing mechanisms as sequentially constructed graphs, where nodes correspond to joints and edges to rigid links. Our approach combines a causal transformer with a Denoising Diffusion Probabilistic Model (DDPM), both conditioned on target trajectories encoded via a transformer encoder. The causal transformer autoregressively predicts discrete topology node-by-node, while the DDPM refines each node's spatial coordinates and edge connectivity to previously generated nodes. This sequential generation enables adaptive trial-and-error synthesis where problematic nodes exhibiting kinematic locking or collisions can be selectively regenerated, allowing autonomous correction of degenerate configurations during design. Our graph-based, data-driven methodology surpasses traditional optimization approaches, enabling scalable inverse design that generalizes to mechanisms with arbitrary node counts. We demonstrate successful synthesis of linkage systems containing up to 20 nodes with extensibility to N-node architectures. This work advances autoregressive graph generation methodologies and computational kinematic synthesis, establishing new paradigms for scalable inverse design of complex mechanical systems.
tldr: The paper introduces LinkD, an autoregressive diffusion model for synthesizing mechanical linkages by sequentially building graphs representing the mechanisms, achieving scalable inverse design for complex mechanical systems.
tldr_zh: 该论文介绍了一种名为LinkD的自回归扩散模型，用于合成机械联动装置，通过顺序构建表示机构的图来实现，从而为复杂的机械系统实现可扩展的逆向设计。
summary_zh: 设计机械连杆机构以实现目标末端执行器轨迹是一项根本性挑战，因为它涉及到连续节点位置、离散拓扑结构和非线性运动学约束之间的复杂耦合。高度非线性的运动-结构关系意味着关节位置的微小扰动会剧烈改变轨迹，而组合式扩展的设计空间使得传统的优化和启发式方法在计算上难以处理。我们引入了一种自回归扩散框架，它利用连杆机构装配的二元特性，将机构表示为顺序构建的图，其中节点对应于关节，边对应于刚性连杆。我们的方法将因果Transformer与去噪扩散概率模型（DDPM）相结合，两者都以通过Transformer编码器编码的目标轨迹为条件。因果Transformer逐节点地自回归预测离散拓扑结构，而DDPM细化每个节点的空间坐标和与先前生成节点的边连接。这种顺序生成使自适应试错合成成为可能，其中表现出运动学锁定或碰撞的问题节点可以被选择性地重新生成，从而允许在设计过程中自主校正退化的配置。我们基于图的、数据驱动的方法优于传统的优化方法，实现了可扩展的逆向设计，并能推广到具有任意节点数的机构。我们展示了包含多达20个节点的连杆系统的成功合成，并可扩展到N节点架构。这项工作推进了自回归图生成方法和计算运动学合成，为复杂机械系统的可扩展逆向设计建立了新的范例。

title: Learning Shortest Paths When Data is Scarce
summary: Digital twins and other simulators are increasingly used to support routing decisions in large-scale networks. However, simulator outputs often exhibit systematic bias, while ground-truth measurements are costly and scarce. We study a stochastic shortest-path problem in which a planner has access to abundant synthetic samples, limited real-world observations, and an edge-similarity structure capturing expected behavioral similarity across links. We model the simulator-to-reality discrepancy as an unknown, edge-specific bias that varies smoothly over the similarity graph, and estimate it using Laplacian-regularized least squares. This approach yields calibrated edge cost estimates even in data-scarce regimes. We establish finite-sample error bounds, translate estimation error into path-level suboptimality guarantees, and propose a computable, data-driven certificate that verifies near-optimality of a candidate route. For cold-start settings without initial real data, we develop a bias-aware active learning algorithm that leverages the simulator and adaptively selects edges to measure until a prescribed accuracy is met. Numerical experiments on multiple road networks and traffic graphs further demonstrate the effectiveness of our methods.
tldr: This paper addresses the problem of learning shortest paths in large-scale networks when real-world data is scarce, by combining abundant synthetic data with limited real observations using a Laplacian-regularized least squares approach and active learning.
tldr_zh: 该论文通过结合大量的合成数据和有限的真实观测，使用拉普拉斯正则化最小二乘法和主动学习，解决了大规模网络中真实数据稀缺时学习最短路径的问题。
summary_zh: 数字孪生和其他仿真器越来越多地被用于支持大规模网络中的路由决策。然而，仿真器输出通常表现出系统性偏差，而真实世界测量成本高昂且稀缺。我们研究一个随机最短路径问题，其中规划者可以访问大量的合成样本、有限的真实世界观测，以及捕获链路间预期行为相似性的边缘相似性结构。我们将仿真器与现实之间的差异建模为未知的、特定于边缘的偏差，该偏差在相似性图上平滑变化，并使用拉普拉斯正则化最小二乘法对其进行估计。即使在数据稀缺的情况下，这种方法也能产生校准后的边缘成本估计。我们建立了有限样本误差界限，将估计误差转化为路径级别的次优性保证，并提出了一个可计算的、数据驱动的证书，用于验证候选路径的近优性。对于没有初始真实数据的冷启动设置，我们开发了一种偏差感知的主动学习算法，该算法利用仿真器并自适应地选择边缘进行测量，直到满足规定的精度。在多个道路网络和交通图上的数值实验进一步证明了我们方法的有效性。

title: Towards Safe Autonomous Driving: A Real-Time Motion Planning Algorithm on Embedded Hardware
summary: Ensuring the functional safety of Autonomous Vehicles (AVs) requires motion planning modules that not only operate within strict real-time constraints but also maintain controllability in case of system faults. Existing safeguarding concepts, such as Online Verification (OV), provide safety layers that detect infeasible planning outputs. However, they lack an active mechanism to ensure safe operation in the event that the main planner fails. This paper presents a first step toward an active safety extension for fail-operational Autonomous Driving (AD). We deploy a lightweight sampling-based trajectory planner on an automotive-grade, embedded platform running a Real-Time Operating System (RTOS). The planner continuously computes trajectories under constrained computational resources, forming the foundation for future emergency planning architectures. Experimental results demonstrate deterministic timing behavior with bounded latency and minimal jitter, validating the feasibility of trajectory planning on safety-certifiable hardware. The study highlights both the potential and the remaining challenges of integrating active fallback mechanisms as an integral part of next-generation safeguarding frameworks. The code is available at: https://github.com/TUM-AVS/real-time-motion-planning
tldr: This paper presents a real-time motion planning algorithm for autonomous vehicles, focusing on safety and fault tolerance by deploying a lightweight planner on an embedded system and demonstrating its deterministic timing behavior.
tldr_zh: 本文介绍了一种用于自动驾驶汽车的实时运动规划算法，专注于安全性和容错性，通过在嵌入式系统上部署轻量级规划器并展示其确定性定时行为。
summary_zh: 确保自动驾驶车辆(AVs)的功能安全需要运动规划模块，这些模块不仅要在严格的实时约束条件下运行，而且要在系统发生故障时保持可控性。现有的安全保障概念，如在线验证(OV)，提供了安全层来检测不可行的规划输出。然而，它们缺乏一种主动机制来确保在主规划器发生故障时安全运行。本文提出了针对具备故障运行能力的自动驾驶(AD)系统的主动安全扩展的第一步。我们在运行实时操作系统(RTOS)的车规级嵌入式平台上部署了一个轻量级的基于采样的轨迹规划器。该规划器在受限的计算资源下连续计算轨迹，为未来的应急规划架构奠定了基础。实验结果表明，该规划器具有确定的时序行为，延迟有界且抖动最小，验证了在安全认证的硬件上进行轨迹规划的可行性。该研究强调了将主动回退机制作为下一代安全保障框架不可或缺的一部分的潜力以及仍然存在的挑战。代码可在以下网址获取：https://github.com/TUM-AVS/real-time-motion-planning

title: Systematic Evaluation of Depth Backbones and Semantic Cues for Monocular Pseudo-LiDAR 3D Detection
summary: Monocular 3D object detection offers a low-cost alternative to LiDAR, yet remains less accurate due to the difficulty of estimating metric depth from a single image. We systematically evaluate how depth backbones and feature engineering affect a monocular Pseudo-LiDAR pipeline on the KITTI validation split. Specifically, we compare NeWCRFs (supervised metric depth) against Depth Anything V2 Metric-Outdoor (Base) under an identical pseudo-LiDAR generation and PointRCNN detection protocol. NeWCRFs yields stronger downstream 3D detection, achieving 10.50\% AP$_{3D}$ at IoU$=0.7$ on the Moderate split using grayscale intensity (Exp~2). We further test point-cloud augmentations using appearance cues (grayscale intensity) and semantic cues (instance segmentation confidence). Contrary to the expectation that semantics would substantially close the gap, these features provide only marginal gains, and mask-based sampling can degrade performance by removing contextual geometry. Finally, we report a depth-accuracy-versus-distance diagnostic using ground-truth 2D boxes (including Ped/Cyc), highlighting that coarse depth correctness does not fully predict strict 3D IoU. Overall, under an off-the-shelf LiDAR detector, depth-backbone choice and geometric fidelity dominate performance, outweighing secondary feature injection.
tldr: This paper systematically evaluates the impact of different depth backbones and semantic cues on monocular Pseudo-LiDAR 3D object detection, finding that depth-backbone choice and geometric fidelity are more crucial than secondary feature injection.
tldr_zh: 本文系统地评估了不同深度骨干网络和语义线索对单目伪激光雷达3D目标检测的影响，发现深度骨干网络的选择和几何保真度比辅助特征的注入更为关键。
summary_zh: 单目3D目标检测为激光雷达提供了一种低成本的替代方案，但由于难以从单张图像中估计度量深度，其精度仍然较低。我们系统地评估了深度骨干网络和特征工程如何影响KITTI验证集上的单目伪激光雷达流程。具体来说，我们比较了NeWCRFs（监督度量深度）和Depth Anything V2 Metric-Outdoor（Base），采用相同的伪激光雷达生成和PointRCNN检测协议。NeWCRFs产生了更强的下游3D检测结果，在使用灰度强度时，在Moderate分割上，IoU$=0.7$时达到了10.50\% AP$_{3D}$（实验2）。我们进一步测试了使用外观线索（灰度强度）和语义线索（实例分割置信度）的点云增强。与语义应大幅缩小差距的预期相反，这些特征仅提供了边际收益，而基于掩码的采样可能会通过移除上下文几何信息来降低性能。最后，我们使用真实2D框（包括Ped/Cyc）报告了深度精度与距离的诊断，强调粗略的深度正确性并不能完全预测严格的3D IoU。总而言之，在现成的激光雷达检测器下，深度骨干网络的选择和几何保真度主导了性能，超过了次要特征的注入。

title: Modeling and Control for UAV with Off-center Slung Load
summary: Unmanned aerial vehicle (UAV) with slung load system is a classic air transportation system. In practical applications, the suspension point of the slung load does not always align with the center of mass (CoM) of the UAV due to mission requirements or mechanical interference. This offset creates coupling in the system's nonlinear dynamics which leads to a complicated motion control problem. In existing research, modeling of the system are performed about the UAV's CoM. In this work we use the point of suspension instead. Based on the new model, a cascade control strategy is developed. In the middle-loop controller, the acceleration of the suspension point is used to regulate the swing angle of the slung load without the need for considering the coupling between the slung load and the UAV. An inner-loop controller is designed to track the UAV's attitude without the need of simplification on the coupling effects. We prove local exponential stability of the closed-loop using Lyapunov approach. Finally, simulations and experiments are conducted to validate the proposed control system.
tldr: This paper presents a modeling and control strategy for a UAV with an off-center slung load, using the suspension point as the modeling origin and developing a cascade control strategy to handle the complex dynamics. Simulations and experiments validate the approach.
tldr_zh: 本文提出了一种针对具有偏离中心悬挂载荷的无人机的建模和控制策略，使用悬挂点作为建模原点，并开发了一种级联控制策略来处理复杂的动力学。仿真和实验验证了该方法。
summary_zh: 配备悬挂负载的无人机（UAV）是一种经典空中运输系统。在实际应用中，由于任务需求或机械干涉，悬挂负载的悬挂点并不总是与无人机的质心（CoM）对齐。这种偏移导致系统非线性动力学中的耦合，从而产生复杂的运动控制问题。在现有研究中，系统建模是围绕无人机的质心进行的。在这项工作中，我们使用悬挂点替代。基于新的模型，开发了一种级联控制策略。在中环控制器中，悬挂点的加速度用于调节悬挂负载的摆动角度，而无需考虑悬挂负载和无人机之间的耦合。设计了内环控制器，以跟踪无人机的姿态，而无需简化耦合效应。我们使用李雅普诺夫方法证明了闭环的局部指数稳定性。最后，通过仿真和实验验证了所提出的控制系统。

title: Revisiting Continuous-Time Trajectory Estimation via Gaussian Processes and the Magnus Expansion
summary: Continuous-time state estimation has been shown to be an effective means of (i) handling asynchronous and high-rate measurements, (ii) introducing smoothness to the estimate, (iii) post hoc querying the estimate at times other than those of the measurements, and (iv) addressing certain observability issues related to scanning-while-moving sensors. A popular means of representing the trajectory in continuous time is via a Gaussian process (GP) prior, with the prior's mean and covariance functions generated by a linear time-varying (LTV) stochastic differential equation (SDE) driven by white noise. When the state comprises elements of Lie groups, previous works have resorted to a patchwork of local GPs each with a linear time-invariant SDE kernel, which while effective in practice, lacks theoretical elegance. Here we revisit the full LTV GP approach to continuous-time trajectory estimation, deriving a global GP prior on Lie groups via the Magnus expansion, which offers a more elegant and general solution. We provide a numerical comparison between the two approaches and discuss their relative merits.
tldr: This paper introduces a novel Gaussian process prior on Lie groups using the Magnus expansion for continuous-time trajectory estimation, offering a more elegant and general solution compared to existing patchwork approaches.
tldr_zh: 本文提出了一种新的高斯过程先验，通过 Magnus 展开在李群上进行连续时间轨迹估计，相比现有的局部拼接方法，提供了一种更优雅和通用的解决方案。
summary_zh: 连续时间状态估计已被证明是一种有效的手段，可以用于 (i) 处理异步和高频测量，(ii) 为估计引入平滑性，(iii) 事后查询测量时间点之外的估计值，以及 (iv) 解决与移动扫描传感器相关的某些可观测性问题。一种流行的连续时间轨迹表示方法是通过高斯过程 (GP) 先验，该先验的均值和协方差函数由白噪声驱动的线性时变 (LTV) 随机微分方程 (SDE) 生成。当状态包含李群的元素时，先前的工作通常采用由局部GP拼凑而成的方法，每个局部GP都具有线性时不变的SDE核，虽然在实践中有效，但缺乏理论上的优雅性。本文我们重新审视了用于连续时间轨迹估计的完整LTV GP方法，通过Magnus 展开推导了李群上的全局GP先验，从而提供了一种更优雅和通用的解决方案。我们提供了两种方法之间的数值比较，并讨论了它们的相对优点。

title: A Future Capabilities Agent for Tactical Air Traffic Control
summary:
Escalating air traffic demand is driving the adoption of automation to support air traffic controllers, but existing approaches face a trade-off between safety assurance and interpretability. Optimisation-based methods such as reinforcement learning offer strong performance but are difficult to verify and explain, while rules-based systems are transparent yet rarely check safety under uncertainty. This paper outlines Agent Mallard, a forward-planning, rules-based agent for tactical control in systemised airspace that embeds a stochastic digital twin directly into its conflict-resolution loop. Mallard operates on predefined GPS-guided routes, reducing continuous 4D vectoring to discrete choices over lanes and levels, and constructs hierarchical plans from an expert-informed library of deconfliction strategies. A depth-limited backtracking search uses causal attribution, topological plan splicing, and monotonic axis constraints to seek a complete safe plan for all aircraft, validating each candidate manoeuvre against uncertain execution scenarios (e.g., wind variation, pilot response, communication loss) before commitment.
  Preliminary walkthroughs with UK controllers and initial tests in the BluebirdDT airspace digital twin indicate that Mallard's behaviour aligns with expert reasoning and resolves conflicts in simplified scenarios. The architecture is intended to combine model-based safety assessment, interpretable decision logic, and tractable computational performance in future structured en-route environments.
tldr: The paper introduces Agent Mallard, a forward-planning, rules-based agent for tactical air traffic control that uses a stochastic digital twin to ensure safety under uncertainty, showing promising initial results.
tldr_zh: 本文介绍了一种名为Agent Mallard的战术空中交通管制前向规划规则代理，该代理使用随机数字孪生来确保不确定性下的安全，并显示出可喜的初步结果。
summary_zh:
不断增长的航空运输需求正在推动自动化技术在空中交通管制中的应用，但现有方法面临着安全保障和可解释性之间的权衡。诸如强化学习等基于优化的方法性能强大，但难以验证和解释，而基于规则的系统虽然透明，但在不确定性下很少检查安全性。本文介绍了Agent Mallard，一种用于系统化空域战术控制的远期规划、基于规则的智能体，它将随机数字孪生直接嵌入到其冲突解决循环中。Mallard在预定义的GPS引导航线上运行，将连续的4D矢量引导简化为航道和高度上的离散选择，并从专家提供的冲突消解策略库中构建分层计划。深度有限的回溯搜索使用因果归因、拓扑计划拼接和单调轴约束来寻找针对所有飞机的完整安全计划，并在提交操作之前，针对不确定的执行场景（例如，风向变化、飞行员反应、通信丢失）验证每个候选动作。

与英国管制员进行的初步演练以及在BluebirdDT空域数字孪生中的初步测试表明，Mallard的行为与专家推理一致，并在简化的场景中解决了冲突。该架构旨在在未来的结构化航路环境中结合基于模型的安全评估、可解释的决策逻辑和易于处理的计算性能。

title: FLNet: Flood-Induced Agriculture Damage Assessment using Super Resolution of Satellite Images
summary: Distributing government relief efforts after a flood is challenging. In India, the crops are widely affected by floods; therefore, making rapid and accurate crop damage assessment is crucial for effective post-disaster agricultural management. Traditional manual surveys are slow and biased, while current satellite-based methods face challenges like cloud cover and low spatial resolution. Therefore, to bridge this gap, this paper introduced FLNet, a novel deep learning based architecture that used super-resolution to enhance the 10 m spatial resolution of Sentinel-2 satellite images into 3 m resolution before classifying damage. We tested our model on the Bihar Flood Impacted Croplands Dataset (BFCD-22), and the results showed an improved critical "Full Damage" F1-score from 0.83 to 0.89, nearly matching the 0.89 score of commercial high-resolution imagery. This work presented a cost-effective and scalable solution, paving the way for a nationwide shift from manual to automated, high-fidelity damage assessment.
tldr: The paper introduces FLNet, a deep learning model that uses super-resolution to enhance Sentinel-2 satellite images for improved flood-induced crop damage assessment, demonstrating better F1-scores compared to lower resolution imagery.
tldr_zh: 该论文介绍了FLNet，一种深度学习模型，它使用超分辨率技术来增强Sentinel-2卫星图像，以改进洪水引起的农作物损害评估，与较低分辨率的图像相比，展示了更好的F1分数。
summary_zh: 洪水过后，分配政府救济工作面临挑战。在印度，农作物普遍受到洪水影响；因此，快速准确地评估作物损失对于有效的灾后农业管理至关重要。传统的人工调查速度慢且存在偏差，而目前基于卫星的方法面临云层覆盖和空间分辨率低等挑战。因此，为了弥合这一差距，本文提出了一种名为FLNet的新型基于深度学习的架构，该架构使用超分辨率技术将Sentinel-2卫星图像的10米空间分辨率提升至3米，然后再进行灾害分类。我们在比哈尔邦洪水影响农田数据集 (BFCD-22) 上测试了我们的模型，结果显示关键的“完全受损”F1分数从0.83提高到0.89，几乎与商业高分辨率图像的0.89分相匹配。这项工作提出了一种经济高效且可扩展的解决方案，为全国范围内从人工到自动化、高保真损伤评估的转变铺平了道路。

title: Unsupervised Modular Adaptive Region Growing and RegionMix Classification for Wind Turbine Segmentation
summary: Reliable operation of wind turbines requires frequent inspections, as even minor surface damages can degrade aerodynamic performance, reduce energy output, and accelerate blade wear. Central to automating these inspections is the accurate segmentation of turbine blades from visual data. This task is traditionally addressed through dense, pixel-wise deep learning models. However, such methods demand extensive annotated datasets, posing scalability challenges. In this work, we introduce an annotation-efficient segmentation approach that reframes the pixel-level task into a binary region classification problem. Image regions are generated using a fully unsupervised, interpretable Modular Adaptive Region Growing technique, guided by image-specific Adaptive Thresholding and enhanced by a Region Merging process that consolidates fragmented areas into coherent segments. To improve generalization and classification robustness, we introduce RegionMix, an augmentation strategy that synthesizes new training samples by combining distinct regions. Our framework demonstrates state-of-the-art segmentation accuracy and strong cross-site generalization by consistently segmenting turbine blades across distinct windfarms.
tldr: The paper introduces an unsupervised region-growing and RegionMix method for wind turbine blade segmentation, aiming for annotation-efficient and generalizable performance across different windfarms.
tldr_zh: 该论文介绍了一种用于风力涡轮机叶片分割的无监督区域生长和区域混合方法，旨在实现跨不同风电场的注释效率和泛化性能。
summary_zh: 风力涡轮机的可靠运行需要频繁的检查，因为即使是微小的表面损伤也会降低气动性能、减少能量输出并加速叶片的磨损。自动执行这些检查的关键是从视觉数据中准确分割涡轮机叶片。这项任务传统上通过密集的、像素级的深度学习模型来解决。然而，这些方法需要大量的标注数据集，从而带来可扩展性方面的挑战。在这项工作中，我们提出了一种标注高效的分割方法，该方法将像素级任务重新定义为一个二元的区域分类问题。图像区域使用完全无监督的、可解释的模块化自适应区域生长技术生成，该技术由图像特定的自适应阈值引导，并通过区域合并过程增强，该过程将碎片化的区域整合为连贯的分割。为了提高泛化能力和分类鲁棒性，我们引入了 RegionMix，这是一种增强策略，通过组合不同的区域来合成新的训练样本。我们的框架展示了最先进的分割精度和强大的跨站点泛化能力，能够在不同的风电场中一致地分割涡轮机叶片。

title: A low-complexity method for efficient depth-guided image deblurring
summary: Image deblurring is a challenging problem in imaging due to its highly ill-posed nature. Deep learning models have shown great success in tackling this problem but the quest for the best image quality has brought their computational complexity up, making them impractical on anything but powerful servers. Meanwhile, recent works have shown that mobile Lidars can provide complementary information in the form of depth maps that enhance deblurring quality. In this paper, we introduce a novel low-complexity neural network for depth-guided image deblurring. We show that the use of the wavelet transform to separate structural details and reduce spatial redundancy as well as efficient feature conditioning on the depth information are essential ingredients in developing a low-complexity model. Experimental results show competitive image quality against recent state-of-the-art models while reducing complexity by up to two orders of magnitude.
tldr: This paper introduces a low-complexity neural network for depth-guided image deblurring using wavelet transform and efficient feature conditioning, achieving competitive image quality with significantly reduced computational cost.
tldr_zh: 本文介绍了一种低复杂度的深度引导图像去模糊神经网络，该网络利用小波变换和高效的特征条件化，在显著降低计算成本的同时，实现了具有竞争力的图像质量。
summary_zh: 图像去模糊是成像领域一个具有挑战性的问题，因为它具有高度的病态性。深度学习模型在解决这个问题上表现出巨大成功，但对最佳图像质量的追求推高了它们的计算复杂度，使得它们在除强大服务器之外的任何设备上都难以实际应用。与此同时，最近的研究表明，移动激光雷达可以提供深度图形式的补充信息，从而提高去模糊质量。在本文中，我们提出了一种用于深度引导图像去模糊的新型低复杂度神经网络。我们证明了使用小波变换来分离结构细节并减少空间冗余，以及对深度信息进行高效的特征条件化，是开发低复杂度模型的关键要素。实验结果表明，该模型在图像质量上与最新的最先进模型相比具有竞争力，同时将复杂度降低了高达两个数量级。

title: A Comparative Study of 3D Model Acquisition Methods for Synthetic Data Generation of Agricultural Products
summary: In the manufacturing industry, computer vision systems based on artificial intelligence (AI) are widely used to reduce costs and increase production. Training these AI models requires a large amount of training data that is costly to acquire and annotate, especially in high-variance, low-volume manufacturing environments. A popular approach to reduce the need for real data is the use of synthetic data that is generated by leveraging computer-aided design (CAD) models available in the industry. However, in the agricultural industry these models are not readily available, increasing the difficulty in leveraging synthetic data. In this paper, we present different techniques for substituting CAD files to create synthetic datasets. We measure their relative performance when used to train an AI object detection model to separate stones and potatoes in a bin picking environment. We demonstrate that using highly representative 3D models acquired by scanning or using image-to-3D approaches can be used to generate synthetic data for training object detection models. Finetuning on a small real dataset can significantly improve the performance of the models and even get similar performance when less representative models are used.
tldr: The paper explores methods for generating synthetic data for agricultural object detection, specifically differentiating stones and potatoes, by using 3D model acquisition techniques when CAD models are unavailable. They find that high-quality 3D models created from scans or image-to-3D approaches, coupled with fine-tuning on real data, yields effective object detection models.
tldr_zh: 该论文探讨了在农业领域生成合成数据以进行目标检测的方法，特别是在无法获得CAD模型的情况下，通过使用3D模型获取技术来区分石块和土豆。他们发现，通过扫描或图像到3D方法创建的高质量3D模型，结合真实数据的微调，可以产生有效的物体检测模型。
summary_zh: 在制造业中，基于人工智能（AI）的计算机视觉系统被广泛应用于降低成本和提高产量。训练这些AI模型需要大量的训练数据，而获取和标注这些数据成本高昂，尤其是在高方差、低产量制造环境中。一种流行的减少对真实数据需求的方法是使用合成数据，这些合成数据通过利用行业中可用的计算机辅助设计（CAD）模型生成。然而，在农业领域，这些模型不易获得，增加了利用合成数据的难度。本文提出了一些替代CAD文件以创建合成数据集的技术。我们衡量了它们在训练AI目标检测模型以在料箱拣选环境中分离石头和马铃薯时，各自的性能表现。我们证明了使用通过扫描或图像到3D方法获取的、具有高度代表性的3D模型可以用于生成合成数据，以训练目标检测模型。在一个小型真实数据集上进行微调可以显著提高模型的性能，甚至在使用代表性较差的模型时也能获得相似的性能。

title: Towards Real-world Lens Active Alignment with Unlabeled Data via Domain Adaptation
summary: Active Alignment (AA) is a key technology for the large-scale automated assembly of high-precision optical systems. Compared with labor-intensive per-model on-device calibration, a digital-twin pipeline built on optical simulation offers a substantial advantage in generating large-scale labeled data. However, complex imaging conditions induce a domain gap between simulation and real-world images, limiting the generalization of simulation-trained models. To address this, we propose augmenting a simulation baseline with minimal unlabeled real-world images captured at random misalignment positions, mitigating the gap from a domain adaptation perspective. We introduce Domain Adaptive Active Alignment (DA3), which utilizes an autoregressive domain transformation generator and an adversarial-based feature alignment strategy to distill real-world domain information via self-supervised learning. This enables the extraction of domain-invariant image degradation features to facilitate robust misalignment prediction. Experiments on two lens types reveal that DA3 improves accuracy by 46% over a purely simulation pipeline. Notably, it approaches the performance achieved with precisely labeled real-world data collected on 3 lens samples, while reducing on-device data collection time by 98.7%. The results demonstrate that domain adaptation effectively endows simulation-trained models with robust real-world performance, validating the digital-twin pipeline as a practical solution to significantly enhance the efficiency of large-scale optical assembly.
tldr: This paper introduces Domain Adaptive Active Alignment (DA3), a method that uses domain adaptation to improve the accuracy of active alignment systems in optical assembly by mitigating the domain gap between simulation and real-world images, achieving near real-world labeled data performance with minimal real data collection.
tldr_zh: 本文介绍了一种名为DA3的域自适应主动对准方法，该方法通过域自适应来弥合仿真和真实世界图像之间的域差距，从而提高光学装配中主动对准系统的精度，以最少的真实数据采集达到接近真实世界标记数据的性能。
summary_zh: 主动对准（AA）是高精度光学系统大规模自动化装配的关键技术。与劳动密集型的逐模型现场校准相比，基于光学仿真的数字孪生管道在生成大规模标注数据方面具有显著优势。然而，复杂的成像条件导致仿真图像与真实图像之间存在领域差异，限制了仿真训练模型的泛化能力。为了解决这个问题，我们提出通过使用在随机未对准位置捕获的少量未标注真实图像来增强仿真基线，从而从领域自适应的角度缩小差异。我们引入了领域自适应主动对准（DA3），它利用自回归领域转换生成器和基于对抗的特征对齐策略，通过自监督学习提取真实世界领域信息。这使得提取领域不变的图像退化特征，从而促进稳健的未对准预测成为可能。在两种镜头类型上的实验表明，DA3比纯仿真管道提高了46%的精度。值得注意的是，它的性能接近于在3个镜头样本上收集的精确标注真实数据所达到的性能，同时将现场数据收集时间减少了98.7%。结果表明，领域自适应能够有效地赋予仿真训练模型强大的真实世界性能，验证了数字孪生管道作为一种切实可行的解决方案，可以显著提高大规模光学装配的效率。

title: Physics-Constrained Cross-Resolution Enhancement Network for Optics-Guided Thermal UAV Image Super-Resolution
summary: Optics-guided thermal UAV image super-resolution has attracted significant research interest due to its potential in all-weather monitoring applications. However, existing methods typically compress optical features to match thermal feature dimensions for cross-modal alignment and fusion, which not only causes the loss of high-frequency information that is beneficial for thermal super-resolution, but also introduces physically inconsistent artifacts such as texture distortions and edge blurring by overlooking differences in the imaging physics between modalities. To address these challenges, we propose PCNet to achieve cross-resolution mutual enhancement between optical and thermal modalities, while physically constraining the optical guidance process via thermal conduction to enable robust thermal UAV image super-resolution. In particular, we design a Cross-Resolution Mutual Enhancement Module (CRME) to jointly optimize thermal image super-resolution and optical-to-thermal modality conversion, facilitating effective bidirectional feature interaction across resolutions while preserving high-frequency optical priors. Moreover, we propose a Physics-Driven Thermal Conduction Module (PDTM) that incorporates two-dimensional heat conduction into optical guidance, modeling spatially-varying heat conduction properties to prevent inconsistent artifacts. In addition, we introduce a temperature consistency loss that enforces regional distribution consistency and boundary gradient smoothness to ensure generated thermal images align with real-world thermal radiation principles. Extensive experiments on VGTSR2.0 and DroneVehicle datasets demonstrate that PCNet significantly outperforms state-of-the-art methods on both reconstruction quality and downstream tasks including semantic segmentation and object detection.
tldr: This paper introduces PCNet, a physics-constrained cross-resolution enhancement network for thermal UAV image super-resolution, addressing limitations of existing methods by preserving high-frequency information and ensuring physical consistency through thermal conduction modeling.
tldr_zh: 本文提出了PCNet，一种物理约束的跨分辨率增强网络，用于热成像无人机图像超分辨率。该方法通过保留高频信息和利用热传导建模确保物理一致性，解决了现有方法的局限性。
summary_zh: 光学引导的热成像无人机图像超分辨率技术因其在全天候监控应用中的潜力而引起了广泛的研究兴趣。然而，现有方法通常会压缩光学特征以匹配热成像特征的维度，从而进行跨模态对齐和融合，这不仅会导致对热成像超分辨率有益的高频信息损失，还会因忽略模态间成像物理差异而引入物理上不一致的伪影，例如纹理失真和边缘模糊。为了解决这些挑战，我们提出了PCNet，旨在实现光学和热成像模态之间的跨分辨率相互增强，同时通过热传导对光学引导过程进行物理约束，从而实现鲁棒的热成像无人机图像超分辨率。具体而言，我们设计了一个跨分辨率相互增强模块（CRME），以联合优化热成像图像超分辨率和光学到热成像模态转换，从而促进跨分辨率的有效双向特征交互，同时保留高频光学先验。此外，我们提出了一种物理驱动的热传导模块（PDTM），该模块将二维热传导纳入光学引导中，对空间变化的导热特性进行建模，以防止不一致的伪影。此外，我们引入了温度一致性损失，该损失强制区域分布一致性和边界梯度平滑性，以确保生成的热成像图像与真实世界的热辐射原理对齐。在VGTSR2.0和DroneVehicle数据集上的大量实验表明，PCNet在重建质量以及语义分割和目标检测等下游任务上均显著优于最先进的方法。

title: GeoDiff-SAR: A Geometric Prior Guided Diffusion Model for SAR Image Generation
summary: Synthetic Aperture Radar (SAR) imaging results are highly sensitive to observation geometries and the geometric parameters of targets. However, existing generative methods primarily operate within the image domain, neglecting explicit geometric information. This limitation often leads to unsatisfactory generation quality and the inability to precisely control critical parameters such as azimuth angles. To address these challenges, we propose GeoDiff-SAR, a geometric prior guided diffusion model for high-fidelity SAR image generation. Specifically, GeoDiff-SAR first efficiently simulates the geometric structures and scattering relationships inherent in real SAR imaging by calculating SAR point clouds at specific azimuths, which serves as a robust physical guidance. Secondly, to effectively fuse multi-modal information, we employ a feature fusion gating network based on Feature-wise Linear Modulation (FiLM) to dynamically regulate the weight distribution of 3D physical information, image control parameters, and textual description parameters. Thirdly, we utilize the Low-Rank Adaptation (LoRA) architecture to perform lightweight fine-tuning on the advanced Stable Diffusion 3.5 (SD3.5) model, enabling it to rapidly adapt to the distribution characteristics of the SAR domain. To validate the effectiveness of GeoDiff-SAR, extensive comparative experiments were conducted on real-world SAR datasets. The results demonstrate that data generated by GeoDiff-SAR exhibits high fidelity and effectively enhances the accuracy of downstream classification tasks. In particular, it significantly improves recognition performance across different azimuth angles, thereby underscoring the superiority of physics-guided generation.
tldr: GeoDiff-SAR is a diffusion model that leverages geometric priors to generate high-fidelity SAR images, outperforming existing methods by explicitly incorporating geometry and enabling control over parameters like azimuth angles.
tldr_zh: GeoDiff-SAR是一个利用几何先验生成高保真SAR图像的扩散模型，通过显式结合几何信息并支持对方位角等参数的控制，优于现有方法。
summary_zh: 合成孔径雷达（SAR）成像结果对观测几何条件和目标的几何参数高度敏感。然而，现有的生成方法主要在图像域内操作，忽略了显式的几何信息。这种局限性通常导致不尽人意的生成质量，并且无法精确控制诸如方位角等关键参数。为了应对这些挑战，我们提出了一种几何先验引导的扩散模型GeoDiff-SAR，用于高保真度的SAR图像生成。 具体而言，GeoDiff-SAR首先通过计算特定方位角的SAR点云，高效地模拟真实SAR成像中固有的几何结构和散射关系，从而提供强大的物理引导。 其次，为了有效地融合多模态信息，我们采用了一种基于特征线性调制（FiLM）的特征融合门控网络，以动态调节3D物理信息、图像控制参数和文本描述参数的权重分布。 第三，我们利用低秩适配（LoRA）架构对先进的Stable Diffusion 3.5 (SD3.5) 模型进行轻量级微调，使其能够快速适应SAR领域的分布特征。 为了验证GeoDiff-SAR的有效性，我们在真实世界的SAR数据集上进行了广泛的对比实验。 结果表明，GeoDiff-SAR生成的数据具有高保真度，并能有效提高下游分类任务的准确性。 特别是，它显著提高了不同方位角下的识别性能，从而突出了物理引导生成的优越性。

title: Enhancing Robustness of Asynchronous EEG-Based Movement Prediction using Classifier Ensembles
summary: Objective: Stroke is one of the leading causes of disabilities. One promising approach is to extend the rehabilitation with self-initiated robot-assisted movement therapy. To enable this, it is required to detect the patient's intention to move to trigger the assistance of a robotic device. This intention to move can be detected from human surface electroencephalography (EEG) signals; however, it is particularly challenging to decode when classifications are performed online and asynchronously. In this work, the effectiveness of classifier ensembles and a sliding-window postprocessing technique was investigated to enhance the robustness of such asynchronous classification. Approach: To investigate the effectiveness of classifier ensembles and a sliding-window postprocessing, two EEG datasets with 14 healthy subjects who performed self-initiated arm movements were analyzed. Offline and pseudo-online evaluations were conducted to compare ensemble combinations of the support vector machine (SVM), multilayer perceptron (MLP), and EEGNet classification models. Results: The results of the pseudo-online evaluation show that the two model ensembles significantly outperformed the best single model for the optimal number of postprocessing windows. In particular, for single models, an increased number of postprocessing windows significantly improved classification performances. Interestingly, we found no significant improvements between performances of the best single model and classifier ensembles in the offline evaluation. Significance: We demonstrated that classifier ensembles and appropriate postprocessing methods effectively enhance the asynchronous detection of movement intentions from EEG signals. In particular, the classifier ensemble approach yields greater improvements in online classification than in offline classification, and reduces false detections, i.e., early false positives.
tldr: This paper explores using classifier ensembles and sliding-window postprocessing to improve the robustness of asynchronous EEG-based movement prediction for robot-assisted stroke rehabilitation, finding that ensembles particularly enhance online classification and reduce false positives.
tldr_zh: 本文探讨了使用分类器集成和滑动窗口后处理来提高基于异步脑电图的运动预测的鲁棒性，用于机器人辅助中风康复，发现集成方法尤其能增强在线分类并减少误报。
summary_zh:
摘要：
目的：卒中是导致残疾的主要原因之一。一种有前景的方法是通过自主启动的机器人辅助运动疗法来延长康复时间。为实现这一目标，需要检测患者的运动意图，以触发机器人设备的辅助。这种运动意图可以从人体表面脑电图（EEG）信号中检测出来；然而，当分类在线和异步执行时，解码尤其具有挑战性。本文研究了分类器集成和滑动窗口后处理技术的有效性，以增强这种异步分类的鲁棒性。方法：为了研究分类器集成和滑动窗口后处理的有效性，分析了两个包含14名进行自主手臂运动的健康受试者的脑电图数据集。进行了离线和伪在线评估，以比较支持向量机（SVM）、多层感知器（MLP）和EEGNet分类模型的集成组合。结果：伪在线评估结果表明，对于最佳数量的后处理窗口，两种模型集成方法明显优于最佳单一模型。特别是，对于单一模型，增加后处理窗口的数量显著提高了分类性能。有趣的是，我们发现离线评估中最佳单一模型和分类器集成的性能之间没有显著改进。意义：我们证明了分类器集成和适当的后处理方法有效地增强了从脑电图信号中异步检测运动意图的能力。特别是，分类器集成方法在在线分类中比在离线分类中产生更大的改进，并减少了误检，即提早的假阳性。

title: Making Tunable Parameters State-Dependent in Weather and Climate Models with Reinforcement Learning
summary: Weather and climate models rely on parametrisations to represent unresolved sub-grid processes. Traditional schemes rely on fixed coefficients that are weakly constrained and tuned offline, contributing to persistent biases that limit their ability to adapt to the underlying physics. This study presents a framework that learns components of parametrisation schemes online as a function of the evolving model state using reinforcement learning (RL) and evaluates the resulting RL-driven parameter updates across a hierarchy of idealised testbeds spanning a simple climate bias correction (SCBC), a radiative-convective equilibrium (RCE), and a zonal mean energy balance model (EBM) with both single-agent and federated multi-agent settings. Across nine RL algorithms, Truncated Quantile Critics (TQC), Deep Deterministic Policy Gradient (DDPG), and Twin Delayed DDPG (TD3) achieved the highest skill and the most stable convergence across configurations, with performance assessed against a static baseline using area-weighted RMSE, temperature profile and pressure-level diagnostics. For the EBM, single-agent RL outperformed static parameter tuning with the strongest gains in tropical and mid-latitude bands, while federated RL on multi-agent setups enabled geographically specialised control and faster convergence, with a six-agent DDPG configuration using frequent aggregation yielding the lowest area-weighted RMSE across the tropics and mid-latitudes. The learnt corrections were also physically meaningful as agents modulated EBM radiative parameters to reduce meridional biases, adjusted RCE lapse rates to match vertical temperature errors, and stabilised SCBC heating increments to limit drift. Overall, results highlight RL to deliver skilful state-dependent, and regime-aware parametrisations, offering a scalable pathway for online learning within numerical models.
tldr: This paper explores using Reinforcement Learning to learn state-dependent parametrizations in weather and climate models, demonstrating improved performance across several idealized testbeds compared to static parameter tuning.
tldr_zh: 本文探讨了使用强化学习在天气和气候模型中学习状态相关的参数化方法，并在几个理想化的测试平台中展示了相对于静态参数调整的性能提升。
summary_zh: 天气和气候模型依赖于参数化来表示未解析的亚网格过程。传统的方案依赖于弱约束的固定系数，并进行离线调整，这导致了持续的偏差，限制了其适应底层物理过程的能力。本研究提出了一个框架，该框架利用强化学习（RL）在线学习参数化方案的组成部分，将其作为演化模型状态的函数，并在一系列理想化测试平台上评估由此产生的RL驱动的参数更新，这些测试平台涵盖了一个简单的气候偏差校正（SCBC）、辐射-对流平衡（RCE）和一个带状平均能量平衡模型（EBM）， 包含单智能体设置和联邦多智能体设置。在九种RL算法中，截断分位数评论家（TQC）、深度确定性策略梯度（DDPG）和双延迟DDPG（TD3）在各种配置中获得了最高的技能和最稳定的收敛性，性能评估是基于使用面积加权的RMSE，温度剖面和气压面诊断与静态基线进行的比较。对于EBM，单智能体RL优于静态参数调整，在热带和中纬度区域的增益最为显著，而多智能体设置上的联邦RL实现了地域专业化的控制和更快的收敛速度，其中采用频繁聚合的六智能体DDPG配置在热带和中纬度区域获得了最低的面积加权RMSE。学习到的修正也具有物理意义，因为智能体调节了EBM辐射参数以减少经向偏差，调整了RCE递减率以匹配垂直温度误差，并稳定了SCBC加热增量以限制漂移。总而言之，结果表明强化学习能够提供熟练的状态相关和状态敏感的参数化，为数值模型中的在线学习提供了一条可扩展的途径。

title: Accounting for Optimal Control in the Sizing of Isolated Hybrid Renewable Energy Systems Using Imitation Learning
summary: Decarbonization of isolated or off-grid energy systems through phase-in of large shares of intermittent solar or wind generation requires co-installation of energy storage or continued use of existing fossil dispatchable power sources to balance supply and demand. The effective CO2 emission reduction depends on the relative capacity of the energy storage and renewable sources, the stochasticity of the renewable generation, and the optimal control or dispatch of the isolated energy system. While the operations of the energy storage and dispatchable sources may impact the optimal sizing of the system, it is challenging to account for the effect of finite horizon, optimal control at the stage of system sizing. Here, we present a flexible and computationally efficient sizing framework for energy storage and renewable capacity in isolated energy systems, accounting for uncertainty in the renewable generation and the optimal feedback control. To this end, we implement an imitation learning approach to stochastic neural model predictive control (MPC) which allows us to relate the battery storage and wind peak capacities to the emissions reduction and investment costs while accounting for finite horizon, optimal control. Through this approach, decision makers can evaluate the effective emission reduction and costs of different storage and wind capacities at any price point while accounting for uncertainty in the renewable generation with limited foresight. We evaluate the proposed sizing framework on a case study of an offshore energy system with a gas turbine, a wind farm and a battery energy storage system (BESS). In this case, we find a nonlinear, nontrivial relationship between the investment costs and reduction in gas usage relative to the wind and BESS capacities, emphasizing the complexity and importance of accounting for optimal control in the design of isolated energy systems.
tldr: This paper presents a computationally efficient framework for sizing energy storage and renewable capacity in isolated energy systems, using imitation learning to approximate stochastic model predictive control and optimize for cost and emission reduction. The framework is applied to an offshore energy system with wind, battery storage and gas turbine.
tldr_zh: 本文提出了一种计算高效的框架，用于确定独立能源系统中储能和可再生能源容量的大小，使用模仿学习来近似随机模型预测控制，并优化成本和减排。该框架应用于一个包含风能、电池储能和燃气轮机的海上能源系统。
summary_zh: 通过逐步引入大量间歇性太阳能或风能发电，实现孤立或离网能源系统的脱碳需要共同安装储能系统或继续使用现有的化石燃料可调度电源来平衡供需。有效的二氧化碳减排量取决于储能和可再生能源的相对容量、可再生能源发电的随机性以及孤立能源系统的优化控制或调度。尽管储能和可调度电源的运行可能影响系统的最佳规模，但在系统规模确定阶段考虑有限时间范围内的最优控制效果具有挑战性。在此，我们提出了一种灵活且计算高效的孤立能源系统中储能和可再生能源容量的规模确定框架，该框架考虑了可再生能源发电的不确定性和最优反馈控制。为此，我们采用模仿学习方法，来实现随机神经模型预测控制（MPC），这使我们能够在考虑有限时间范围内的最优控制的同时，将电池储能和风力峰值容量与排放减少和投资成本联系起来。通过这种方法，决策者可以评估在任何价格点下，不同储能和风力容量在可再生能源发电不确定性且有限预测能力的情况下的有效减排量和成本。我们通过一个海上能源系统的案例研究来评估所提出的规模确定框架，该系统包含燃气轮机、风电场和电池储能系统（BESS）。在该案例中，我们发现了投资成本与相对于风力和BESS容量的燃气用量减少之间的非线性、非平凡关系，强调了在孤立能源系统设计中考虑最优控制的复杂性和重要性。

title: Local Intrinsic Dimensionality of Ground Motion Data for Early Detection of Complex Catastrophic Slope Failure
summary: Local Intrinsic Dimensionality (LID) has shown strong potential for identifying anomalies and outliers in high-dimensional data across a wide range of real-world applications, including landslide failure detection in granular media. Early and accurate identification of failure zones in landslide-prone areas is crucial for effective geohazard mitigation. While existing approaches typically rely on surface displacement data analyzed through statistical or machine learning techniques, they often fall short in capturing both the spatial correlations and temporal dynamics that are inherent in such data. To address this gap, we focus on ground-monitored landslides and introduce a novel approach that jointly incorporates spatial and temporal information, enabling the detection of complex landslides and including multiple successive failures occurring in distinct areas of the same slope. To be specific, our method builds upon an existing LID-based technique, known as sLID. We extend its capabilities in three key ways. (1) Kinematic enhancement: we incorporate velocity into the sLID computation to better capture short-term temporal dependencies and deformation rate relationships. (2) Spatial fusion: we apply Bayesian estimation to aggregate sLID values across spatial neighborhoods, effectively embedding spatial correlations into the LID scores. (3) Temporal modeling: we introduce a temporal variant, tLID, that learns long-term dynamics from time series data, providing a robust temporal representation of displacement behavior. Finally, we integrate both components into a unified framework, referred to as spatiotemporal LID (stLID), to identify samples that are anomalous in either or both dimensions. Extensive experiments show that stLID consistently outperforms existing methods in failure detection precision and lead-time.
tldr: The paper introduces a novel spatiotemporal Local Intrinsic Dimensionality (stLID) method for early detection of complex landslide failures by incorporating velocity, spatial correlations, and temporal dynamics into LID scores, outperforming existing methods in precision and lead-time.
tldr_zh: 该论文介绍了一种新颖的时空局部内禀维度 (stLID) 方法，通过将速度、空间相关性和时间动态结合到 LID 分数中，用于早期检测复杂滑坡，并在精度和提前期方面优于现有方法。
summary_zh: 局部固有维度 (LID) 已显示出在识别高维数据中的异常值和离群点方面的强大潜力，并已应用于广泛的现实世界应用中，包括颗粒介质中的滑坡破坏检测。及早准确地识别滑坡易发区的破坏区域对于有效的地质灾害减缓至关重要。虽然现有方法通常依赖于通过统计或机器学习技术分析的地表位移数据，但它们往往无法捕捉到此类数据中固有的空间相关性和时间动态。为了弥补这一不足，我们专注于地面监测的滑坡，并引入一种新颖的方法，该方法联合结合了空间和时间信息，从而能够检测复杂的滑坡，包括发生在同一斜坡的不同区域的多次连续破坏。具体而言，我们的方法建立在现有基于 LID 的技术 sLID 之上。我们通过三个关键方式扩展了它的能力。（1）运动学增强：我们将速度纳入 sLID 计算中，以更好地捕捉短期时间依赖性和变形速率关系。（2）空间融合：我们应用贝叶斯估计来聚合空间邻域内的 sLID 值，从而有效地将空间相关性嵌入到 LID 分数中。（3）时间建模：我们引入了一个时间变体 tLID，它可以从时间序列数据中学习长期动态，从而提供位移行为的稳健时间表示。最后，我们将这两个组件集成到一个统一的框架中，称为时空 LID (stLID)，以识别在空间或时间维度上或两者兼而有之的异常样本。大量实验表明，stLID 在破坏检测精度和提前期方面始终优于现有方法。
